title: Research with traders 2020 to 2023
body: " This research was commissioned under the Conservative administration (2010 to 2024), and conducted between 2020 and 2022.   HMRC commissioned Ipsos to conduct research with VAT registered businesses based in Great Britain (GB) and Northern Ireland (NI) to monitor their readiness to continue trading goods with the European Union (EU) both during and after the transition period.  "
